what_it_does: Records a raised signal that the operator decided the 'Push the drawn style further first' option for the global visual-fidelity decision, and states that work gated on that decision may resume.
observations: YAML frontmatter carries id, board:// address, type=signal, source=claude_code, state=raised, and a history transition from null to raised by operator
A single attached_to link points to decision://global/visual-fidelity
The markdown body restates the chosen option and frames the file as a decision.decided signal
Created and updated timestamps are identical, indicating an initial filing
symbols[] is empty; there are no code symbols
standouts: It is an explicit resume/unblocking signal tied to a decision URI
The source is claude_code but the author_session is operator, showing human-triggered intent captured by the system
The chosen option is stated both in the title and the body
conventions: Follows the noticeboard item schema with YAML frontmatter and a markdown body
Uses URI schemes (board://, decision://) for addressing and linking
Includes an audit history entry with from/to state, actor, timestamp, and note
notes: A decision signal that the operator picked 'Push the drawn style further first' for visual-fidelity and that downstream work gated on that decision can resume.
questions: Which specific work items or lanes are gated on decision://global/visual-fidelity?
What does 'Push the drawn style further first' concretely change in design or code?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the stated purpose is to record a decision signal and unblock gated work, and the file does exactly that.
intention_signals: Broadcast a resolved design choice downstream so that blocked work can proceed with the selected visual direction.
contribution: Captures a discrete, timestamped decision signal with a clear chosen option and a link to the governing decision URI, enabling downstream consumers to know when to resume gated work.
summary_for_embedding: A noticeboard signal item recording the operator's decision to push the drawn style further first for the global visual-fidelity decision and indicating that gated work can resume.
intention_for_embedding: To broadcast the resolved visual-fidelity option and unblock dependent work.
